use std::time::Instant;

fn process_items(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<ProcessedItem> {
    items
        .iter()
        .map(|item| {
            // BAD: Instant::now called multiple times per item
            let start = Instant::now();
            let parsed = parse_item(item);
            let parse_time = start.elapsed();

            let start = Instant::now();
            let validated = validate(parsed);
            let validate_time = start.elapsed();

            let start = Instant::now();
            let transformed = transform(validated);
            let transform_time = start.elapsed();

            transformed
        })
        .collect()
}

struct Item { data: String }
struct ProcessedItem { result: String }
fn parse_item(i: &Item) -> Item { Item { data: i.data.clone() } }
fn validate(i: Item) -> Item { i }
fn transform(i: Item) -> ProcessedItem { ProcessedItem { result: i.data } }
